dimensions.name: confidence_calibration
dimensions.description: Asks rather than asserts under weak signal

input_context.hiring_signal_brief: Peers show a pattern; prospect has no public mirror signal—avoid condescending gap claims.

Hello,

Some peer companies in your segment posted similar roles; that may or may not apply to BenchCo235.

I am not assuming a gap on your side; if this is on your roadmap, I can share how teams scoped the first 90 days.

Best,
